paper_focus.title: Mechanical properties of Fe–Al–M–C (M=Ti, V, Nb, Ta) alloys with strengthening carbides and Laves phase
paper_focus.research_objective: To improve the room temperature ductility and high temperature strength of iron-aluminide alloys through precipitation strengthening by carbides and Laves phases.
main_process_variables: alloying element type (Ti, V, Nb, Ta)
testing temperature (room temperature to 800 °C, including yield stress anomaly range)
casting condition (vacuum induction melting, copper mould casting)
